headline: Backend Engineer | Python | Cloud Native
summary: Passionate backend engineer with 4 years of experience building scalable APIs and microservices. Strong focus on clean code and test-driven development.

experience.title: Backend Engineer
experience.description: Building payment processing microservices handling 500K daily transactions. Implemented event-driven architecture using Kafka. Reduced API latency by 40%.

experience.title: Software Developer
experience.description: Developed REST APIs for analytics dashboard using Python and FastAPI. Managed PostgreSQL databases and implemented caching with Redis.

projects.title: Real-time Payment Gateway
projects.description: Designed and built a real-time payment processing gateway handling 10K TPS using Python, Kafka, and PostgreSQL. Implemented idempotency and retry mechanisms.

projects.title: API Rate Limiter
projects.description: Built a distributed rate limiting service using Redis and Python, deployed on Kubernetes. Handles 1M+ requests per minute.
